title: Vacancy for Teacher at Chandigarh University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Chandigarh University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
